docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHALLENBERGER, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLDEN, MATTHEW $186.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $261.00, THIS CASE RULED UPON AS CROSS CLAIM TO CSM 18-858351 PURSUANT TO STIPULATE. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANT LISA SCHALLENBERGER $186 BECAUSE REPAIRS AND DEDUCTIONS FOR CLEANING EXCEEDS BY $186. COURT ADJUSTS SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $4674. TOTAL REPAIRS AND CLEANING ARE $4860. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SCHALLENBERGER, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT HOLDEN, MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HOLDEN, MATTHEW
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-07-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT HOLDEN, MATTHEW

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LISA SCHALLENBERGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT MATTHEW GERARD HOLDEN. THIS CASE IS HEARD WITH CSM 18-859351. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS FOR BOTH 18-859351 AND 19-859768 RETAINED IN THE OTHER CASE AS PLAINTIFF HOLDEN/DEFENDANT SCHALLENBERGER. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
